name: Canal Palace Hotel
description: Elegant 17th-century canal house in the heart of the Grachtengordel, steps from the Anne Frank House and Rijksmuseum. Featuring original period details, canal views from every room, and a private boat dock.

name: Museum Quarter Inn
description: Well-appointed hotel a short walk from the Rijksmuseum, Van Gogh Museum, and Stedelijk. Comfortable rooms with modern amenities, popular with cultural travellers.

name: Jordaan Garden Hotel
description: Charming boutique hotel tucked in the picturesque Jordaan neighbourhood. Surrounded by independent galleries, cosy cafes, and boutique shops. Canal-view breakfast terrace.

name: Central Budget Inn
description: No-frills budget option located 200 metres from Amsterdam Centraal station. Clean rooms, friendly staff, and unbeatable connectivity to the entire city.

name: Vondelpark Family Suites
description: Spacious family suites adjacent to Vondelpark. Kids play area, cot hire, and early dinner service. Easy tram access to major attractions.

name: De Pijp Boutique
description: Stylish boutique in Amsterdam's trendiest neighbourhood. Walking distance to the Albert Cuyp market, craft beer bars, and international restaurants. Rooftop terrace with city views.

name: Leidseplein Inn
description: Lively hotel at the heart of Amsterdam's entertainment district. Theatre, clubs, and restaurants at the doorstep. Excellent tram connections.

name: Luxury Canal House
description: Exclusive private canal house converted to a five-star property. Six suites, personal concierge, private canal tours, and bespoke Amsterdam experiences for discerning couples.

name: Plantage Heritage Hotel
description: Historic hotel in the quiet Plantage district, adjacent to Artis Zoo and Hortus Botanicus. A tranquil base perfect for families who want to explore east Amsterdam.

name: Waterfront Apartments
description: Self-catering apartments on the IJ waterfront with panoramic harbour views. Modern Scandinavian design, full kitchens, ideal for longer romantic stays or independent couples.

name: Noord Loft Hotel
description: Industrial-chic lofts in Amsterdam Noord reached by free ferry from Centraal. Popular with creatives and budget travellers seeking an off-the-beaten-path experience.

name: Rembrandtplein Suites
description: Upscale suites above the iconic Rembrandtplein square. Business amenities, meeting rooms, and easy access to both cultural sights and after-dark entertainment.

name: Le Marais Classic Hotel
description: Stylish mid-range hotel in the historic Marais district. Walking distance to the Picasso Museum, Place des Vosges, and some of Paris's best bistros and cocktail bars.

name: Eiffel Tower View Hotel
description: Luxurious hotel with direct Eiffel Tower views from the upper-floor suites. Celebrated restaurant, rooftop champagne bar, and white-glove concierge service.

name: Saint-Germain Boutique
description: Intimate Left Bank hotel in Saint-Germain-des-Prés. Steps from the Musée d'Orsay and Luxembourg Gardens. Quintessentially Parisian with exposed stone walls.

name: Montmartre Budget Hotel
description: Affordable option in bohemian Montmartre. Near Sacré-Cœur and the artist ateliers. Metro access makes city-wide exploration easy.

name: Louvre Proximity Hotel
description: Family-friendly hotel a five-minute walk from the Louvre. Connecting rooms available, child menus in the restaurant, and multilingual staff.

name: Left Bank Luxury Residence
description: The pinnacle of Parisian luxury on Boulevard Saint-Germain. Private art collection, bespoke dining, and an expert team curating exclusive cultural experiences.

name: Bastille Inn
description: Vibrant hotel in the Bastille neighbourhood. Surrounded by wine bars, jazz clubs, and authentic French brasseries. Easy metro access to all arrondissements.

name: Champs-Élysées Grand
description: Flagship business hotel on the prestigious avenue. Premium conference facilities, 24-hour business centre, and direct RER access to Charles de Gaulle airport.

name: Montparnasse Budget
description: Well-located budget hotel near Montparnasse station. Regular TGV and metro connections. Clean, simple rooms popular with solo travellers and backpackers.

name: Pigalle Design Boutique
description: Artistically designed boutique in Pigalle. Independent music venues, jazz clubs, and Montmartre moments within walking distance. A favourite for creative travellers.

name: Latin Quarter Residence
description: Authentic Parisian experience in the Latin Quarter. Near the Panthéon, Sorbonne, and Cluny Museum. Unpretentious and charming.

name: Paris Family Hotel
description: Designed for families, with extra-large rooms, kids' activity kits, and a private courtyard garden. Well connected by metro to Disneyland Paris day trips.

name: Gothic Quarter Inn
description: Atmospheric hotel in the ancient Barri Gòtic. Steps from Barcelona Cathedral, Picasso Museum, and the vibrant Born district. Unbeatable location for city explorers.

name: Barceloneta Beach Hotel
description: Stylish hotel a block from Barceloneta beach. Perfect for those who want to blend sightseeing with beach life. Rooftop pool with Mediterranean views.

name: Eixample Luxury
description: Contemporary luxury in the Modernista heart of Barcelona. Surrounded by Gaudí architecture. Business amenities, a spa, and exceptional Catalan cuisine.

name: Gràcia Boutique
description: Romantic boutique in the bohemian Gràcia neighbourhood. Lively plazas, artisan shops, and a favourite local nightlife scene right outside.

name: Las Ramblas Hotel
description: Classic hotel right on Las Ramblas. Access to Boqueria market, Miró Foundation, and the Gothic Quarter. Vibrant location, noisy at night — earplugs provided.

name: Sagrada Família View
description: The only hotel with a direct Sagrada Família view from the breakfast room. Family-friendly, with a rooftop terrace for iconic photographs at golden hour.

name: Budget Barcelona Centre
description: Affordable and central, near Plaça de Catalunya. Quick metro access to all major Barcelona sights. Basic but spotless rooms.

name: Park Güell Retreat
description: Calm retreat in the upper city near Park Güell. Peaceful garden, romantic terraces with panoramic Barcelona views. A 15-minute metro ride to the centre.

name: El Born Design Hotel
description: Award-winning design hotel in the fashionable El Born district. Contemporary art installations, rooftop bar, and close to the Santa Maria del Mar church.

name: Poblenou Loft
description: Affordable loft apartments in up-and-coming Poblenou. Creative atmosphere, beach within walking distance, and good metro links. Popular with digital nomads.

name: Montjuïc Suites
description: Family-friendly suites with Montjuïc views. Near the MNAC museum, the Olympic stadium, and the cable car. A quieter Barcelona experience.

name: Barcelona Family Hotel
description: Spacious family rooms with bunk beds, family breakfast package, and a kids' splash pool. Excellent metro access.

name: Colosseum View Hotel
description: Magnificent hotel with direct Colosseum and Forum views. Roman history at your window. Butler service, bespoke archaeological tours, and a rooftop terrace dining experience.

name: Trastevere Inn
description: Charming inn in Rome's most atmospheric neighbourhood. Cobblestone lanes, ivy-clad facades, trattorias, and lively piazzas just outside the door.

name: Vatican Guest House
description: Peaceful, family-friendly accommodation a short walk from St. Peter's Basilica and the Vatican Museums. Early Museum access packages available.

name: Spanish Steps Suites
description: Exclusive suites steps from the Spanish Steps and the Trevi Fountain. An ultra-romantic address with bespoke shopping tours and private chef dining.

name: Campo de' Fiori Boutique
description: Intimate boutique hotel overlooking the legendary Campo de' Fiori market. Wine bars, artisan food shops, and authentic Roman osterie right outside.

name: Palatine Budget Hotel
description: Affordable option near the Palatine Hill and Circus Maximus. Clean, unpretentious, and a genuine base for budget-conscious history lovers.

name: Prati Boutique
description: Elegant boutique in the upscale Prati district, minutes from the Vatican. Quiet streets, excellent neighbourhood restaurants, and easy metro to the city centre.

name: Piazza Navona Inn
description: Sophisticated hotel facing one of Rome's great baroque squares. Nightly living theatre of street artists, upscale dining, and rooftop views of the eternal city.

name: Testaccio Local Hotel
description: Authentic neighbourhood hotel in Testaccio — Rome's food district. Offal restaurants, vinyl record stores, and a genuinely local atmosphere away from the tourist trail.

name: Roman Forum View
description: Prestigious hotel whose terraces overlook the Roman Forum. Incomparable historic panoramas, Michelin-starred dining, and impeccable five-star service.

name: Gianicolo Retreat
description: Secluded romantic retreat on the Gianicolo hill. Private garden, panoramic city views, and a tranquil escape from Rome's bustle. Just 15 minutes to the centre.

name: Rome Family Residences
description: Spacious self-catering residences for families. Large kitchens, laundry, cot hire, and a communal garden. Close to Villa Borghese gardens and zoo.

name: Alfama Viewpoint Hotel
description: Romantic miradouro hotel in the historic Alfama district. Azulejo-tiled hallways, fado drifting up from nearby taverns, and sweeping Tagus river views from the terrace.

name: Bairro Alto Boutique
description: Fashionable boutique in Bairro Alto, Lisbon's nightlife and creative hub. Independent restaurants, natural wine bars, and the city's best fado clubs within a short walk.

name: Belém River Hotel
description: Modern hotel on the Tagus riverfront near the iconic Belém Tower and Jerónimos Monastery. Family-friendly, with cycle paths and riverside promenades.

name: Chiado Luxury Hotel
description: The finest address in central Lisbon. Located in the elegant Chiado district, with award-winning Portuguese cuisine, a rooftop terrace, and a curated local art collection.

name: Mouraria Budget Inn
description: Budget-friendly inn in Mouraria, Lisbon's vibrant multicultural quarter. Near São Jorge Castle and the fado origins neighbourhood. Excellent bus connections.

name: LX Factory Loft
description: Converted industrial lofts adjacent to the LX Factory creative complex. Sunday market, independent restaurants, rooftop cinema, and craft cocktail bars.

name: Santos Design Hotel
description: Contemporary design hotel in the Santos arts district. International design festival hub, riverfront gallery, and close to the vibrant Cais do Sodré nightlife zone.

name: Intendente Guesthouse
description: Affordable guesthouse in the revitalised Intendente square. Multicultural eateries, tram access, and a genuinely local Lisbon experience at unbeatable value.

name: Príncipe Real Suite Hotel
description: Discreet luxury in Lisbon's most refined neighbourhood. Antique gardens, curated food and wine experiences, and a celebrated spa. Perfect for romantic getaways.

name: Expo Area Business Hotel
description: Modern hotel in the Parque das Nações (Expo) district. Riverfront location, conference facilities, and excellent connections to the airport and city centre.

name: Lisbon Family Resort
description: Spacious family-friendly hotel with a pool, kids' club, and connecting rooms. 20 minutes to central Lisbon by metro, quieter environment for families.

name: Parque Eduardo VII Hotel
description: Well-located hotel overlooking the city's grand park. Easy access to the Gulbenkian Museum, Marquês de Pombal square, and the Avenida da Liberdade boutiques.
